programme.title: Only the Valiant
programme.desc: Capt. Richard Lance is unjustly held responsible, by his men and girlfriend, for an Indian massacre death of beloved Lt. Holloway. Holloway is killed while escorting a dangerous Indian chief to another fort's prison. The chief escapes. Knowing their fort is in danger of Indian attack, Lance takes a small group of army misfits to an abandoned nearby army fort to defend a mountain pass against the oncoming Indian assault. Their mission is to stall for time until reinforcements from another fort arrive. The men in this small group of malcontents, deserters, psychopaths and cowards all hate Capt. Lance and wish him dead. Much to their chagrin, the men recognize that Lance's survival instincts, military knowledge and leadership are the only chance the group has of staying alive.

programme.title: Keoma
programme.desc: A half-breed ex-Union gunfighter attempts to protect his plague-ridden hometown from being overridden by his racist half-brothers and a Confederate tyrant.

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: Ted Hayden impersonates a wanted man and joins Gentry's gang only to learn later that Gentry was the one who killed his father. He saves Virginia Winters' dad's ranch from Gentry and also rescues his long-lost brother Spud.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: In Tulsa, after a rancher dies during a feud with a major oil company, his daughter, driven by revenge, starts digging for oil herself.

programme.title: Life is Tough, Eh Providence
programme.desc: An eccentric bounty hunter named Providence captures and sets free a criminal in order to collect the same bounty over and over again in different states, until they discover that a local sheriff is up to something crooked.

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: OLIVIA is picked to run the Christmas recital of The Nutcracker. When a video of Michael practising ballet with Lily goes viral, Olivia sees how much dance really means to the community. Will Olivia be able to save her dance studio with Michael's help?

programme.title: Christmas at Pemberly Manor
programme.desc: A NYC event planner butts heads and then falls for a billionaire who is in the process of selling the charming estate she was hoping to use as a venue.

programme.title: A Song for Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents stumble into the possibility of love for Christmas, only to discover that their daughters are embroiled in a rivalry at school. When the rivalry gets out of control, can hope and healing lead everyone to a peaceful and merry Christmas?

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.title: The Christmas Cure
programme.desc: When Vanessa returns home for Christmas, her name comes up for a huge promotion back at work! She is torn between taking the job or staying home to take over the family clinic, while her visit has rekindled an old romance as well.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: An obsessive astronomer and a curious artist form an unlikely bond which leads them to a profound, scientific discovery.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: Gladiator meets Game of Thrones in this electrifying epic starring Academy Award winner Morgan Freeman and Academy Award nominee Clive Owen. In an age of honour and justice by the sword Raiden is a fallen warrior who must rise up against a corrupt and sadistic ruler to avenge Bartok, his dishonoured master.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: The true story of an ordinary man's extraordinary battle with nature. A fisherman must survive in the freezing ocean after his boat capsizes off the south coast of Iceland.

programme.title: Mr. Jones
programme.desc: A young couple moves to the woods and soon finds their nightmares and reality colliding.

programme.title: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: Seven guests, a newly hired personal secretary and two staff are gathered for a weekend on an isolated island by the hosts the Owens who are delayed. At dinner a record is played and the host's message alleges that all the people present are guilty of murder and suddenly the first of them is dead, then the next - It seems that one of them is the murderer but the leading person is always the person who is murdered next and at last only two people are left.

programme.title: Steve
programme.desc: If grinding in the bustling streets of NYC isn't enough for a Broadway actress, an uninvited guest in her apartment might be just the thing to put her over the edge.

programme.title: Phantom Ship
programme.desc: During a horrific storm at sea, the crew realizes that there is a murderer among them who is killing them off one by one.

programme.title: Silver On The Sage
programme.desc: Hoppy goes undercover as an Eastern gambler to rein in the fraternal perpetrators of a cattle-rustling scheme.

programme.title: Life With Father
programme.desc: A straitlaced turn-of-the-century father presides over a family of boys and the mother who really rules the roost.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Depp, Paltrow, and McGregor star in this globe-trotting comedy about an unlikely team recruited to find a stolen, priceless painting.

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: The Colony
programme.desc: Beneath the icy surface, survivors of Colony Seven struggle as food supplies dwindle and temperatures drop. Plagued by illness, the colonists suspect the worst when they mysteriously lose contact with Colony Five, the only other known settlement

programme.title: The Immortal Wars: Rebirth
programme.desc: Rebirth takes place during the early brutal stages of Dominion Industries. In this story watch Olive and other deviants undergo a series of deadly experiments lead by Laurie Harvey and her team.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Last Survivors
programme.desc: Last Survivors takes place in a post-apocalyptic world where Troy (Stephen Moyer) raises his now grown son, Jake (Drew Van Acker), in a perfect wooded utopia thousands of miles away from the decayed cities. When Troy is severely wounded, Jake is forced to travel to the outside world to find life-saving medicine. Ordered to kill anyone he encounters, Jake defies his father by engaging in a forbidden relationship with a mysterious woman, Henrietta (Alicia Silverstone). As Jake continues this dangerous affair, Troy will stop at nothing to get rid of Henrietta and protect the perfect utopia he created.

programme.title: ShockWave: Countdown to Disaster
programme.desc: A stolen seismic weapon is activated in Yemen. A hostage freed there tries in vain to warn against its global effect. It starts seismic activity at the Californian fault line where her daughter and ex are monitoring it. Can they stop it?

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: From the directors of Daybreakers, PREDESTINATION chronicles the life of a Temporal Agent (Ethan Hawke) sent on an intricate series of time-travel journeys designed to stop crimes before they are committed. Now, on his final assignment, he must pursue the one criminal that has eluded him throughout time.

programme.title: Ivy & Mistletoe
programme.desc: A young woman is determined to get home for Christmas, but gets stranded in a small town during a snow storm. Little does she know that she is exactly where she is supposed to be.

programme.title: In The Moon's Shadow
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters amid tragedy unlock the truth to family secrets on a self-reflecting journey to see the Great American Eclipse.

programme.title: WWJD What Would Jesus Do?
programme.desc: A group of Americans - a singer, a newspaper editor, a pastor and a real estate mogul - vow to walk in the steps of Jesus. Every day, every decision becomes a turning point in their lives as they must ask themselves "What Would Jesus Do?"

programme.title: It Had to be You
programme.desc: When her ad agency is absorbed by a much larger, more powerful firm, Darby's rivalry with new partner Derrick could blossom into something else.

programme.title: The Music in Me
programme.desc: A singer/songwriter leaves her dreams behind to help her family, until one special guy and a group of musically-challenged strangers help her find her voice again.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers, Jack and Joy, awaken together to discover they've gotten married following a night of debauchery in Sin City, and one of them has won a huge jackpot after playing the other's quarter. When a judge refuses to have the marriage annulled, the newlyweds devise ever-escalating schemes to undermine each other and get their hands on the money – only to find themselves falling in love amid the mutual backstabbing.

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: Penelope is a first time Olympian and an introverted cross-country skier, who, after finishing her event early on in the games, finds herself spending time in Athletes Village with the gregarious and outgoing volunteer dentist, Ezra. While both are eager to form connections at the Olympic Games, they are held back by the very thing that has propelled them to this point what do you do once your lifelong dream has come true, and you're faced with taking the next step? As Penelope and Ezra navigate the vulnerable slopes, they push one another to embrace qualities they lost sight of in pursuit of their dreams.

programme.title: Very Good Girls
programme.desc: EXCLUSIVELY AVAILABLE ON DIGITAL PLATFORMS. Best friends Lily (Dakota Fanning) and Gerry (Elizabeth Olsen), home for one last New York summer, make a pact to lose their virginity before leaving for college. But when they both fall for the same handsome artist (Boyd Holbrook) and Lily starts seeing him in secret, a lifelong friendship is tested.

programme.title: The Big Wedding
programme.desc: With an all-star cast led by Robert DeNiro, Katherine Heigl, Diane Keaton, Amanda Seyfried and Topher Grace, with Susan Sarandon and Robin Williams, THE BIG WEDDING is an uproarious romantic comedy about a charmingly modern family trying to survive a weekend wedding celebration that has the potential to become a full blown family fiasco.

programme.title: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea spends her Halloween fending off killers, ghosts and zombies while keeping an eye on a group of teens.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's A Madea Family Funeral
programme.desc: Madea finds herself unexpectedly planning a funeral that might unveil unsavory family secrets.

programme.title: Dirty Grandpa
programme.desc: Just before his wedding, Jason Kelly is tricked into driving his grandfather to Florida for spring break.
A young writer is forced to accept his mortality when he discovers he has a rare form of cancer.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: The Broken
programme.desc: After seeing herself drive down the street, Radiologist Gina McVey unravels a mystery centered around a broken mirror.

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: From the director of WOLF CREEK comes this terrifying look at nature's perfect killing machine. When a group of tourists stumble into the remote Australian river territory of an enormous crocodile, the deadly creature traps them on a tiny mud island with the tide quickly rising and darkness descending. As the hungry predator closes in, they must fight for survival against all odds. Starring SAM WORTHINGTON (Terminator Salvation, Avatar) RADHA MITCHELL (Silent Hill) and MICHAEL VARTAN (Alias), Rogue delivers intense action and breathless suspense as it speeds towards the intense final showdown.

programme.title: The Fortress
programme.desc: From the mastermind behind Squid Game. The fate of a nation is at stake in this lavish historical war epic. Based on the 17th century Chinese invasion of Korea and its subsequent subjugation of the royal court. 1636, Korea's Joseon kingdom is invaded by a Chinese army aligned with the Manchu Qing dynasty. King Injo and his men take refuge in a mountain fortress, but the bitter feud continues.

programme.title: Lucky Grandma
programme.desc: A dark comedy full of heart, laughs and wicked sass. The story of a cardigan clad, chain smoking Chinese Grandma who in an attempt to get some cash goes all in at a casino but lands herself on the wrong side of luck. When she steals loot from a dead criminal boss, she hires a rival gangland bodyguard to protect her from the violent crooks who are after her to reclaim the cash.

programme.title: Frat Pack
programme.desc: Let your world rock with this raucously wild comedy from Michael Philip (Van Wilder 2), starring Danny Trejo (Machete), Melissa Bolona (Acts of Violence) and Hana Mae Lee (Pitch Perfect). A shy British graduate is dragged on a wild road trip across USA to a fraternity party, by his soon-to-be stepbrothers, as his mother marries into a larger-than-life American family. A brotherhood like no other!

programme.title: Backtrace
programme.desc: Brought to you by the producers of '2 Guns' and 'Escape Plan', action legend and three-time Academy Award nominee Sylvester Stallone (Rocky, The Expendables) stars in this riveting crime thriller that hinges on memory, fury, and betrayal. After suffering a brain injury from a bank heist gone wrong, MacDonald (Matthew Modine: Stranger Things) develops amnesia and is put into a prison psychiatric ward. Following his seventh year in evaluation, he is coerced by an inmate (Ryan Guzman: Notorious) and a ward doctor to break out of prison and injected with a serum that forces him to relive the life he's forgotten. MacDonald must now elude a local detective (Sylvester Stallone), a toughened FBI agent (Christopher McDonald: Ballers) and the drug's dangerous side effects in order to recover the stolen money all while confronting his past.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns and tense scenes, Arctic will keep you breathless until the end. Mads Mikkelsen (Hannibal) gives a tour de force performance as a pilot whose plane has crashed in a remote corner of the Arctic. Stranded in the wilderness he uses his ingenuity to survive. But the pilot is forced to make a perilous choice between the relative safety of his camp and a deadly trek into the unknown.

programme.title: Welcome To Christmas
programme.desc: Madison Lane is a property developer searching for the perfect location for a new ski resort. Will she ultimately fall for the charms of a small Colorado town and its handsome, widowed sheriff? (2018)

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: Mayoral rivals Liam and Sarah enter a decorating contest to prove their town has the best Christmas spirit. But will the competition ultimately bring them closer together? Stars Tricia Helfer. (2019)

programme.title: Christmas Cupcakes
programme.desc: Two rival sisters are forced to work together to save the family bakery from bankruptcy. Will their entry into a television baking competition bring them a much-needed Christmas miracle? (2018)

programme.title: Beverly Hill Christmas
programme.desc: A spoilt, rich, young teenage girl is about to find that true value is not found in price tags and 'things' but by the kind acts of helping others with the helping hand of a guardian angel (2015)

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: Returning to her hometown to restore a derelict hotel in time for Christmas Eve, a young widow discovers that old passions and true love can never be fully forgotten. Alexa PenaVega stars. (2017)

programme.title: Love On The Sidelines
programme.desc: Laurel accepts a job as a personal assistant to an injured American football star. Unenthused at first about hiring a female assistant, will their frosty relationship ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: Jaded designer Lauren decides to move back home after three years trying to make her career in Seattle. Lauren soon finds out that the city has more to offer then she could have imagined. (2020)

programme.title: Rome in Love
programme.desc: Amelie high profile role, to play Audrey Hepburn's character in a remake of Roman Holiday has gained press attention. Can she keep her identity under wraps whilst in Rome? (2019)

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Chole wishes to bring her college friends back together for a trip to Iceland. Will an unexpected guest and seeing the northern lights, give her the new perspective on life and love? (2020)

programme.title: PENNY AND THE POWNALL CASE
programme.desc: An artist's model, with aspirations to be an amateur detective, helps a Scotland Yard detective break a gang helping Nazi war criminals escape from Europe.

programme.title: TAKE MY LIFE
programme.desc: When a temperamental opera star finds out her husband is accused of murder she sets off to find the real killer and is determined to prove her husbands innocence. As she comes closer to the truth, she also comes closer to danger.

programme.title: BEHIND THE HEADLINES
programme.desc: When a journalist begins his investigations into the murder of a woman, he is joined by a pretty female reporter who is more intent on catching him than the murderer.

programme.title: BLACK ORCHID
programme.desc: When John falls in love with his wife's sister he asks his wife for a divorce. Their plans are ruined when it is revealed that it is illegal for him to marry his divorced wife's sister. When she suddenly dies it looks suspiciously like murder.

programme.title: THE EMBEZZLER
programme.desc: When an elderly bank clerk with only two years to live absconds with the contents of a bank safe, his plan to escape to a hot and exciting South American country to live out his final years in a blaze of fun and wealth becomes ever more precarious.

programme.title: THE HIDEOUT
programme.desc: Helen has to deliver a case. When the case is mistaken as part of Steve's luggage he gives it to his friend, Tim, to return. Tim opens the case to find it is full of money, which leads him to Helen's father and a whole lot of trouble.

programme.title: Witchville
programme.desc: In the middle ages, Erik and Jason seek revenge against the Evil Red Queen for the death of the King and the devastation of their land.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe stars as Noah, a man chosen by God for a great task before an apocalyptic flood destroys the world.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century.

programme.title: Revolver
programme.desc: Conman and hotshot gambler Jake Green has spent the last seven years in prison, taking the rap for a crime he did not commit. Now he's out and itching for revenge against crime boss and casino owner Dorothy Macha.

programme.title: The Exorcist III
programme.desc: A police lieutenant uncovers more than he bargained for as his investigation of a series of murders, which have all the hallmarks of the deceased 'Gemini' serial killer, lead him to question the patients of a psychiatric ward.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: Welcome to Black Lake. Its placid waters compliment the pristine Maine wilderness it borders. This tranquil setting is probably the last place you'd expect a gruesome fatality. But then it's also the last place you'd expect to find a 30-foot, narrow-snouted, multi-toothed, reptile of the species Crocodylus--an eating machine more commonly known as a crocodile.

programme.title: Wind Chill
programme.desc: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

programme.title: The Evil Dead (1983)
programme.desc: Writer/Director SAM RAIMI's relentless, gore-spattered debut is a landmark in horror cinema, a no-holds-barred onslaught of gruesome terror and nightmarish effects which has earned its rightful status as a legendary cult classic. Five college students travel to a remote cabin in the woods and unwittingly unleash a monstrous evil force hellbent on their total destruction. Now with newly restored state-of-the-art digitally remastered picture and loaded with incredible extras, THE EVIL DEAD is truly the ultimate experience in grueling horror.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A 15-year-old music fan and fledgling journalist goes on the road with a popular rock band in the anything-goes 1970's.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Tres chicos intentan compensar las oportunidades perdidas en su infancia formando un equipo de b�isbol para competir contra unos matones de la liga menor.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: When a couple of lazy hunter-gatherers (Black and Cera) are banished from their primitive village, they set off on an epic journey through the ancient world.

programme.title: First Sunday
programme.desc: Durell and LeeJohn are best friends and bumbling petty criminals. When told they have one week to pay a $17,000 debt or Durell will lose his son, they come up with a desperate scheme to rob their neighborhood church. Instead, they end up spending the night in the presence of the Lord and are forced to deal with much more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Process Server Dale Denton has a grudging business relationship with the laconic Saul Silver, deigning to visit only to purchase Saul's primo product ' a rare new strain of pot called Pineapple Express. But when Dale becomes the only witness to a murder by a crooked cop and the city's most dangerous drug lord, he panics and dumps the Pineapple Express at the scene. When it's traced back to him, Dale and Saul run for their lives' and they quickly discover that they're not just suffering from weed-fueled paranoia. If they survive, these two just might become real friends.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, high school basketball coach Al Collins assembles students from five different Louisiana schools and leads them all the way to the state championships.

programme.title: Mr. Nobody
programme.desc: A boy stands on a station platform as a train is about to leave. Should he go with his mother or stay with his father? Infinite possibilities arise from this decision. As long as he doesn't choose, anything is possible.

programme.title: Boulevard
programme.desc: While Nolan Mack (Academy Award-winner Robin Williams, Good Will Hunting, Dead Poets Society, Aladdin) and his wife Joy (Kathy Baker, The Age of Adaline, Edward Scissorhands) wake up under the same roof each morning, separate bedrooms underscore the disparate worlds they are living in. Nolan's steady disconnection carries on in his job at the bank, where even a promotion cannot seem to lift the emptiness that permeates his life.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Behind The Line
programme.desc: Occupied France, 1940. A Nazi Commander discovers one of his prisoners, Danny (Sam Gittins) is a champion boxer. He forces him to fight for his companies entertainment.

programme.title: Pursuit
programme.desc: Undercover Detective Mike Breslin is embedded deep within a ruthless drugs cartel, hunting for his wife's killer. But as his deadly pursuit forces him ever higher through the gang's ranks, he must forge an uneasy alliance with a reckless hacker to reach the top, and get his man.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two cops, a rookie and a grizzled vet, pursue an accomplished bank robber.

programme.title: Mehek S1 E31
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats S1 E31
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts S1 E31
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances S1 E31
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar S1 E31
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate S1 E31
programme.desc: Arjun spends time with Preeta and the Aroras. When he returns home, Anjali overhears him confessing his feelings for Preeta alone in the car.

programme.title: Trinayani S1 E31
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: The Good Son S1 E31
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: Bucketlist South America
programme.desc: One of the biggest continents crammed with adventures and possibilities, South America should be up there on any wildlife watcher's bucket list. From record breaking rivers and longest mountain ranges to the steepest waterfalls and most massive rainforests, the variety of landscapes supports a seemingly endless diversity of wildlife. Here you can find the biggest rodents, otters and parrots, with unique mammals and marine life and spectacular predators. Make sure you don't miss South America!

programme.desc: Seeks to find the rare and endangered species of South Africa and establish what we need to do to conserve them. Documenting and recording the status of our endangered species by region.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Asia - Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Great Gobi National Park: Mongolia – Following the Wild Camels
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean.

programme.title: One Year in Norway's Lofoten: One Year in Norway's Lofoten
programme.desc: Winter means more than just the beginning of the year for the people of Lofoten: For more than a thousand years, Lofoten has been a hub for cod fishing, with seasons lasting from February to April as huge shoals migrate from the Barents Sea to these waters. During these hectic months, more than 65,000 tons of fish are brought to shore, securing the income for the whole of Lofoten for years to come. Around a quarter of the fish caught ends up on lines to dry upon racks. From a young age, the children from the fishing villages get to earn some pocket money by cutting cod tongues and selling the produce as a delicacy appreciated by the locals.

programme.title: One Year in Norway's Lofoten: One Year in Norway's Lofoten
programme.desc: Almost unnoticeably, spring turns into summer. The days become longer and longer, with a never-setting sun. People who have spent their winter and spring working hard can finally enjoy their own nature, even though the temperature is only slightly warmer. Lofoten is sparsely populated, just 24,000 people live here. Unstad is one of its smallest communities with only 15 inhabitants, but despite that, it has become a hotspot for arctic surf and is host to the northern-most surf center in the world. Surfers from all over the globe come to surf in the arctic water.

programme.title: Europe's far North
programme.desc: Lofoten is the rugged archipelago in the Norwegian Arctic Ocean. Whoever arrives here is really at the end. Moskenes is the end of the line, and anyone who wants to go further needs a boat or a plane. The only way to get to the open sea is via the Maelstrom, which is quite dangerous. On the outermost headland, there are only a few ruins left. The last inhabitants are long gone, a supply was hardly possible. But fishermen are on the way, mainly to catch cod. And there is the coastal administration, which takes care of broken sea marks and lighthouses. A visit to one of the luxurious ships of the Hurtig Line is not to be missed. They shuttle off rough coasts on an eleven-day trip between the Russian border and southern Norway. A floating workplace for a wide variety of professions. The island of Andøya is not served by the Hurtiglinie. It lies too far out in the Atlantic. One of the most important observatories in Europe is located here. A young woman, Sandra Blindheim, is the boss. She is responsible for the large laser that delivers important information to scientists around the world. On clear winter nights, there is a wonderful panoramic view of the aurora borealis.

programme.title: Countries People Adventures
programme.desc: In southeastern Iceland, Europe's largest glacier, the gigantic Vatnajökull, covers an area of around 9,000 square kilometers. Beneath it lie the world's most active and dangerous volcanoes. This extreme landscape is as dangerous as it is fascinating: glistening white glacier tongues, lagoons covered with icebergs, bizarre green lava mountains, snow-covered volcanic cones, solidified lava flows and imposing waterfalls overwhelm everyone who gets to see them. In 2008, Icelanders declared the glacier and adjacent areas a national park, the largest in Europe. In this documentary, the team meets people who live, work or do research here: a life with the dangers of fire and ice in the overwhelming landscape of Vatnajökull National Park.

programme.title: mareTV: Denmarks Limfjord
programme.desc: Wide open spaces, water, meadows: The Limfjord stretches through Jutland in Denmark in countless bays, canals and sounds. Mighty water castles, country palaces and magnificent monasteries are enthroned on its shores. It is a rather lonely area, even in high summer it is quiet. This is probably why the people here are so friendly and sociable. Birte, Silla and Bo cycle to their fjord garden project in the harbor of the town of Løgstør to harvest mussels, oysters and seaweed. They think gardening is best in a club. Luckily, Silla, a resourceful tinkerer, has just made another ingenious invention: the mussel washing machine. Cruising the narrow Næssund, a branch of the Limfjord, is the Næssund Ferry, the smallest and oldest car ferry in the area. New on board, and the first and only woman on this ship, is deckhand Lilian Kohler. She is "girl for everything", but wants more, because Lilian is a trained navigator. She is magically drawn to the bridge, but the old captain doesn't think much of retiring ashore.

programme.title: Wildest Islands

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.sub-title: Closing the Worst Zoo In The World
programme.desc: Animals at a struggling zoo in Gaza are in desperate need of aid. Left devastated by war, Khan Younis Zoo was dubbed the ‘worst zoo in the world.' In 2014 Khan Younis Zoo boasted 44 animals now only 15 remain. FOUR PAWS must rapidly swing into action

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.sub-title: Sanctuary for Wildlife in the Middle East and the Rhino Crisis
programme.desc: Facing the constant threat of poaching, we meet the team who put their lives on the line to raise orphaned rhinos and return them to the wild and in Jordan, we follow the high stakes mission to give rescued wild animals, an inspiring new home.

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: It's the end of her time at the rescue mission, now she must successfully release her favourite birds back into the sea. Have they learnt enough to survive in the wild? Michaela certainly hopes so.

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: Michaela Strachan takes things to the next level as she signs up as a volunteer on Africa's biggest penguin rescue mission. Will Michaela be able to cope and takes on the care of hundreds of abandoned penguin chicks at the SANCCOB sea bird hospital?

programme.title: Doug to the Rescue
programme.desc: Doug checks in on some of the dogs he's rescued before turning his attention to the high desert outside LA and a boxer who's spent 15 months fending for itself in the wild.

programme.title: Living Nature
programme.desc: Each episode illustrates four different species at Bussolengo Nature Park, where experts carefully protect and maintain 260 different species of our most amazing animals.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Alaska is one of the last true wildernesses on earth. But in Anchorage you don't have to head into to the wild to discover the wildlife. With a city that has so much green space, it means everywhere is fair game for its wild neighbours.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: With so many animals living in the city, sometimes they get themselves into trouble. But help is never far away. In Anchorage the wildlife come first, with lots of organisations and people that are working hard to protect them.

programme.title: City Zoo
programme.desc: In this episode we meet the Big Cats. The zoo crew treats a tiger called Lolo with a toothache. Adrian and Jacquie rescue three teenage lion cubs from an illegal facility and transport them to their new home at City Zoo.

programme.title: City Zoo
programme.desc: In this episode we learn to tell the difference between both the white and black rhino residents. Adrian and the zoo crew travel to the Lichtenburg Breeding centre to monitor a herd of white rhino.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 12, Curacao
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let's see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 13, Jordan
programme.desc: Ten of the world's strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan's first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World's Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season's finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan's Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We'll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It's a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.
